pi_items.source: task.json description and export_result.sh glob pattern '/home/ga/Cases/Targeted_Ingest_2024*/autopsy.db'
task.json description, setup_task.sh checks for this exact path, and install_autopsy.sh downloads DFTT #7 to this path
task.json description and export_result.sh checking for 'WARRANT_SCOPE' in autopsy logs
task.json description, export_result.sh checking report_path, and verifier.py parsing
export_result.sh output path and verifier.py reading from result_file_vm

privileged_info_summary: The task operates on the Digital Forensics Tool Testing (DFTT) #7 NTFS Undelete test image, a synthetic test disk image downloaded from SourceForge. The instructions require creating a case named 'Targeted_Ingest_2024' (case number 'INV-TGT-001'), adding the '/home/ga/evidence/ntfs_undel.dd' image, and configuring an ingest filter named 'Warrant_Scope'. The final expected audit report must be written to '/home/ga/Reports/filter_audit.txt'. All metadata claims correctly match the task description instructions and are enforced by export_result.sh and verifier.py.
